name: pi-loops
description_en: Repeat-send a prompt to the pi agent on a fixed interval. Each repeat arrives as a user message with a Loop header (created time / repeat count / user task). Adds /loop commands and a loop tool.
description_zh: 以固定间隔重复向 pi 代理发送提示。每次重复都作为带有 Loop 标头的用户消息到达（创建时间/重复次数/用户任务）。添加 /loop 命令和循环工具
